decision: Chose Next.js App Router over Pages Router
rationale: Server components reduce bundle size significantly and App Router is the recommended path forward

decision: Added motion library for animations instead of CSS transitions
rationale: motion provides declarative API and handles reduced-motion preferences automatically

decision: Implemented JWT-based authentication with refresh tokens
rationale: Service will run across multiple regions, stateless auth preferred
reversibility_plan: Would require session store setup and token migration

decision: Used shadcn Button instead of custom implementation
rationale: Faster delivery, accessible by default, consistent with design system
Core features not complete, i18n adds complexity
